theorem ofExpression_correct (p : ℕ) (e : Expression p) (ae : AffineExpression p) :
  some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e
  → ae.eval = e.eval := by
  intro h
  have h₁ : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e = some ae := by
    rw [h]

simp [h, AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval] at h ⊢
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    | variable x =>
      simp [h, AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval] at h ⊢
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    | addition e₁ e₂ =>
      simp [h, AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval] at h ⊢
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.add]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Option.some_inj]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.add]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })
    | multiplication e₁ e₂ =>
      simp [h, AffineExpression.ofExpression?, Expression.eval] at h ⊢
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { aesop }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [Option.some_inj]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
      <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [AffineExpression.eval, mul_by_number]
        <;>
        ring_nf at *
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  exact h₁

  have h₂ : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e = some ae := by

  have h₃ : e.eval = ae.eval := by

    -- Use the property that the evaluation of the expression is equal to the evaluation of its affine expression
